backend/main.mo: Main actor for the ICP canister implementing user profiles, AI media generation via Replicate, gallery management, Stripe integration, and role-based access control with admin/user permissions.
backend/migration.mo: Defines the canister upgrade migration module with OldActor state shape and a no-op run function that passes state through unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (Replicate API key admin UI, exponential backoff retry, typed error UX) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's frontend components, pages, hooks, and configuration.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the UI.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'AI Media Studio' with Google Fonts preconnect and a root div for the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that wraps the TanStack Router with a forced dark ThemeProvider and a styled Sonner Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-page access denied screen with a destructive icon and a back-to-home button, shown to non-admin users on restricted routes.
frontend/src/components/GalleryCard.tsx: Gallery card component that renders image or video previews with hover effects, a type badge, and an external link overlay.
frontend/src/components/GenerationTab.ts: React component for generating images or videos from a text prompt, with retry logic (up to 3 attempts with exponential backoff), status tracking, and error mapping for Replicate API responses.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component providing a sticky header with logo, responsive navigation (desktop and mobile), auth controls (login/logout), credit display, and a profile setup modal trigger.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users to enter a display name and saves their profile via the `useSaveCallerUserProfile` mutation.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Route guard component that shows a loading spinner while initializing, or a login prompt if unauthenticated, and renders children only when the user is authenticated.
frontend/src/components/ReplicateConfigS: Admin UI component for viewing and setting the Replicate API key, showing current configuration status and a password input with visibility toggle.
frontend/src/components/StripeConfigSetu: Admin UI component for configuring Stripe payments by entering a secret key and managing an allowed-countries list; shows a success state if Stripe is already configured.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to handle login, logout, and identity persistence with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including user profile, image/video generation, gallery, admin operations, credits, and Stripe checkout sessions.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines dark-first CSS custom properties (oklch color tokens) plus utility classes for glass morphism and glow effects.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that displays user stats and a user table with credit adjustment controls, protected by an admin role check.
frontend/src/pages/CreditsPage.tsx: Credits purchase page showing the user's current balance and three predefined credit bundle options that initiate a Stripe checkout session on selection.
frontend/src/pages/GalleryPage.tsx: Displays a protected gallery page showing the user's AI-generated media in a responsive grid, with loading skeletons, an empty state, and a button to navigate to the generate page.
frontend/src/pages/GeneratePage.tsx: Protected page for generating AI images and videos via tabbed interface, showing the user's current credit balance and delegating generation logic to the GenerationTab component.
frontend/src/pages/IndexPage.tsx: Public landing page with a hero banner, feature highlights, and CTA buttons that direct authenticated users to generate media or unauthenticated users to log in via Internet Identity.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailurePage.ts: Displays a payment failure message with options to retry by navigating to the credits page or return to the home page.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccessPage.ts: Displays a payment success confirmation, invalidates the credits query to refresh the balance, and provides navigation to start generating or view credit balance.
frontend/src/routeTree.ts: Defines the TanStack Router route tree, mapping URL paths to page components under a shared Layout root route.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL query parameters from both standard and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and a function to remove sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Space Grotesk, JetBrains Mono), oklch-based color tokens (primary, surface, cyan/emerald/amber glows), border radii, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 9) describing a full-stack ICP-based AI media generation app with features including Internet Identity auth, personal gallery, admin panel, Stripe payments, and a dark ultra-modern UI, along with known issues around media generation failures in production.
